drafts.description: h5py h5i.get_name() unchecked malloc -> PyBytes_FromString(NULL) segv/abort under OOM (G-1, ~35% of all crashes, dominant). FIX VERIFIED locally (fix.patch on h5i.templ.pyx).
drafts.why_unfiled: Report DRAFTED not filed (user reviewing); found via fusil --oom-foreign plugin

drafts.description: HDF5 H5P/H5SL/H5S property-list + skip-list + dataspace machinery not allocation-failure safe; 4 ASan manifestations (heap-buffer-overflow, 2x NULL-deref, UAF), H5Pset_layout corrupts DCPL skip-list -> H5P_close crashes.
drafts.why_unfiled: Report DRAFTED not filed; found via fusil --oom-foreign plugin (h5py 3.16 / libhdf5 1.14.6)

drafts.description: ASan repro isolating the H5SL__insert_common heap-buffer-overflow (HC-1) inside the hdf5_property_list_oom_family report.
drafts.why_unfiled: Supporting ASan repro for the drafted (unfiled) HDF5 report

drafts.description: h5py @with_phil exception-path Py_INCREF(NULL) segv; root-caused as Cython-generated __exit__ (likely upstream Cython), secondary in h5py report.
drafts.why_unfiled: Secondary finding in the drafted (unfiled) h5py report

drafts.description: cext-review-toolkit astropy C-extension review: WCS wrapper error-path bugs (leaked refs, missing NULL checks), FITS compression missing safety checks, IterParser dealloc omissions. Gist sent to maintainers; offered umbrella issue + per-finding issues/PRs.

notes: Two large lafleur session transcripts (crashers/session_crash_20260105_093730_9015/visual.md and labeille_prompts.md) contain most non-bug references (lafleur repo issues #304-#328, known_issues.json curation of existing CPython JIT bugs, and CSS hex colors like #166534 that the naive #NNNN regex catches — excluded as noise). ~30 crashers/report_trigger_*.md + report_crash_*.md + session_crash_*/report_*.md files describe fusil finds (asyncio futureiter, csv, exceptiongroup repr OOB, functools.partial, pyexpat, sqlite collation, ssl SNI decref, termios PyLong, zoneinfo x2, pickle frozenset, imp, et/elementtree, tracemalloc, os/sys/ssl ASan cpu_load, packaging, unicodedata, mypy, ipyt segv, trace_length segv) that carry NO embedded issue/PR reference — they are candidate findings whose filed-status is not recorded in these local artifacts and must be reconciled against GitHub live. The wsgiref find has a local ISSUE_DRAFT.md but was filed as python/cpython#153354 (per catalog anchor). OOM findings use an OOM-00NN internal id scheme (catalog cpython-oom-findings); the umbrella is #151763 with per-finding sub-issues. cereggii bugs came from fusil OOM/FT fuzzing while building the fusil_cereggii_plugin. h5py/HDF5 came from fusil --oom-foreign (fusil_h5py_plugin). Distinct upstream/extension BUG references (excluding tooling PRs and pure cross-refs): cpython filed = #151763,#151818,#151673,#151773,#151842,#151931,#152034,#152058,#152107,#152851,#153354,#132461(+#132462),#145197,#146102(+#146443); cereggii filed = #145,#146,#147,#148,#149. Total DISTINCT references catalogued in this file (all categories incl. cross-refs, gists, bpo): ~55 (plus the compact fusil ~75-number and lafleur ~11-number tooling-PR lists and the lafleur #304-#328 issue range).
